title: Reverse Proxies, Forwarded Trust, Message Framing, and Smuggling Defense · Mastery Check
summary: A production-readiness review compares near-miss decisions for reverse proxies, forwarded trust, message framing, and smuggling defense and requires the smallest safe proxy rewrite and parser-consistency threat model with changed-request evidence. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for proxy rewrite and parser-consistency threat model. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Trace downstream and upstream connections, hop-by-hop versus end-to-end fields, termination points, authority, scheme, client address, and failure ownership.
Use ReverseProxy.Rewrite with separate inbound and outbound requests, SetURL and reviewed SetXForwarded behavior, and reject deprecated Director trust assumptions.
Strip untrusted forwarding fields, rebuild them only at trusted hops, constrain backend targets, remove hop-by-hop state, and prevent header spoofing.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Go server Proxy Hop Origin Model · changed case · Quiz Proxy Hop Origin Model
steps.instruction:
